data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users expect a familiar experience with the design based on their experiences with similar products.
data.technical_spec: Design elements echo industry standards for AI interfaces.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The time taken to make a decision increases with the number and complexity of choices.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu options to minimize decision paralysis.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Predicts the time required to move to a target area, such as a button or control.
data.technical_spec: Ensures interactive elements are adequately sized and spaced.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Users judge an experience based on the peak moment and the end.
data.technical_spec: Designs highlight key interactions and ensure a strong finish.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Objects that are close together are perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Grouping related content logically through spacing.
